Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Dec-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Lisa R. Roberts; McNamara, Ambacher, Wheeler, Hirsig & Gray LLP; 925-939-5330; appearing for defendants and cross-complainants Chris Fitzsimmons and CCFDCY I, LLC.
Thomas W. J. Purtell; The Law Offices of Thomas W.J. Purtell; 415-722-6291; appearing for plaintiffs Kristen Mary and David Chung.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. Plaintiff requests that the court award more attorney fees. Defendant argues that the amount of attorney hours claimed is excessive. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KRISTEN MARY, DAVID CHUNG MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is GRANTED in the amount of $85,000.00 at a reasonable rate for hours reasonably and necessarily spent on litigating this action.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
